Index.title: AI Study Buddy
Index.description: Unlock your child's potential with AI-powered personalized learning.

hero.headline: Empower Your Child to Learn Smarter, Not Just Faster
hero.subheadline: AI Study Buddy provides step-by-step explanations and similar practice problems tailored to your child's grade level and understanding.

ocr.desc: Take a photo of any problem and get instant, kid-friendly explanations.

stepByStep.title: Step-by-Step Concepts
stepByStep.desc: We don't just give answers. We teach the 'why' and 'how' behind every problem.

practice.title: Smart Practice
practice.desc: AI generates similar problems to ensure mastery of the concept.

Tutor.subtitle: Your personal guide to mastering any concept.
